Log:
  www/py-bleach: Update to 1.4

  - Add BUILD_DEPENDS on six
  - Update minimum version for html5lib RUN_DEPENDS
  - Add TESTS option and tweak existing QA/Test entries
  - Modernize Python framework entries
  - Add LICENSE_FILE
